name: talk-craft
description: Talk craft plugins for writing professional, persuasive presentations — narrative architecture, slide-level craft, and delivery, independent of any slide tool

plugins.name: talk-craft
plugins.description: Tool-agnostic rules and recipes for writing a professional presentation: Minto pyramid/SCQA/MECE, narrative arcs (Sparkline/Hero/SCQA/Raskin), assertion-evidence slides (sentence headline + visual evidence), data storytelling (Knaflic/Tufte), and delivery. Enforces 8 iron rules covering message, structure, slide craft, and delivery. Composes with slidev-deck-stack for implementation.
